author: feral-core
description: Production-grade PDF reader: layout-preserving text, markdown tables, embedded images, OCR fallback, and metadata extraction.

endpoints.description: Extract rich text from a local PDF file with layout-preserving structure, markdown tables, and optional images. Falls back to OCR for scanned pages.

params.name: path
params.description: Absolute or relative path to a PDF file

params.name: page_end
params.description: 1-based page number to end at (default: last page)

params.name: max_chars
params.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default 60000)

params.name: include_images
params.description: Whether to extract embedded images as base64 (default false)

endpoints.returns_description: Structured text with page metadata, markdown tables, optional images, and truncation flag

endpoints.description: Extract PDF metadata: title, author, creation date, page count, keywords, etc.

params.name: path
params.description: Absolute or relative path to a PDF file

endpoints.returns_description: PDF metadata fields (title, author, subject, dates, page count)

endpoints.description: Extract embedded images from PDF pages as base64-encoded PNGs.

params.name: path
params.description: Absolute or relative path to a PDF file

params.name: page_end
params.description: 1-based page number to end at (default: last page)

params.name: max_images
params.description: Maximum number of images to extract (default 10, max 50)

endpoints.returns_description: Array of base64-encoded PNG images with dimensions and page numbers
